summary: Analysis of whether CP on Tesla Cybertruck discontinuation question will be above 9% on Jan 15
content:
Key facts:
- Current CP as of 2026-01-03: exactly 9.00%
- Target date: 2026-01-15 (9 days from current reading)
- Threshold: HIGHER than 9.00% (even 9.01% = YES)
- Number of forecasters: 26 (small base, volatile)
- CP history: unavailable from API

Underlying question: Will Tesla discontinue Cybertruck before April 1, 2026?
- Cybertruck sales are very poor (~20K/year, down 62% YoY as of Q3 2025)
- Cheapest model already discontinued (Sep 2025)
- Multiple production pauses in 2025
- But full discontinuation is a dramatic step Tesla hasn't taken
- Elon Musk companies (SpaceX) buying Cybertrucks for fleet use

CP dynamics:
- 26 forecasters = high sensitivity to individual forecasts
- CP sits exactly at threshold - any upward noise triggers YES
- Negative news environment for Cybertruck could attract higher-estimate forecasters
- But 9% already reflects the bad news
- Over 9 days, could see a few new forecasters

Assessment: ~50-55% YES. The CP is exactly at threshold with small forecaster base. Slight upward lean due to negative news environment, but close to coin flip.
